---
title: "The Hermit, or, The Unparalled Sufferings and Surprising Adventures of Mr. Philip Quarll, an Englishman, who was lately discovered . . . upon an uninhabited island in the South-Sea"
---

## The Hermit, or, The Unparalled Sufferings and Surprising Adventures of Mr. Philip Quarll, an Englishman, who was lately discovered . . . upon an uninhabited island in the South-Sea

**Author:** Peter Longueville
**Date:** 1727
**Imprint:** London: Cluer

### Notes

An early imitation of Defoe’s <i>Robinson Crusoe</i> (1719).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
